## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature (new tool, new category, etc.)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Code improvement (refactor, cleanup, performance)

## Checklist

- [ ] Tested on at least one supported distro (Ubuntu 24.04, 22.04, Debian 12, or Linux Mint 22)
- [ ] Installer still runs end-to-end without errors
- [ ] New tool is idempotent (safe to run twice)
- [ ] Added tool to health check in `install.sh`
- [ ] Added tool to uninstaller in `uninstall.sh`
- [ ] Updated `README.md` if needed
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md`
- [ ] No hardcoded paths or secrets
